page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier across most standard workloads. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng score of 1869.19 and a multi-core score of 7770.86. Memory subsystem performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 421.23 GB/sec, which drops to 60.9 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. In database operations, the instance achieves a Passmark database score of 4136.83 and handles 8.03 million Redis SET operations per second. However, it exhibits poor performance in larger computational tasks, such as LLM inference on a 7B model, where it registers 16.24 tokens/sec for prompt processing and 7.51 tokens/sec for text generation.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.r7se.2xlarge provides a cost-effective profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The high memory allocation per core makes it suitable for hosting relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, and enterprise applications with moderate CPU demands. It is less suited for heavy machine learning inference or high-throughput storage-bound applications due to the lack of local disks and lower baseline network bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, it provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Baseline network performance is rated at 3 Gbps. Benchmark results show average performance, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 5941.0 and a Redis throughput of 8.03 million SET operations per second. Conversely, it exhibits weak performance in complex tasks like 7B LLM inference. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy, non-storage-intensive workloads, making it well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and general enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB of RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases and caching.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance with 8 Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM, ideal for database and caching workloads.
tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring high memory density per core for caching and relational database workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz
64.0 GB of system memory providing 8 GB per core
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Delivers 8.03 million Redis SET operations per second
Suited for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
